sources.cleaned_content:
GYEON Q2M ScrubPad EVO

Price: €8.00 / 15.65лв.

Code: GYQ2MSPEVO

Weight: 0.200 Kgs

Availability: In stock

Q²M ScrubPad EVO is a double-sided cleaning pad measuring 8x10cm, used for effective and safe treatment of car interiors.

Product Images:
- https://autolab.bg/userfiles/productlargeimages/product_4441.jpg
- https://autolab.bg/userfiles/productlargeimages/product_4442.jpg
- https://autolab.bg/userfiles/productlargeimages/product_4443.jpg

Brand Website: https://gyeon.co/country/netherlands/

Detailed description:

Q²M ScrubPad EVO is a double-sided cleaning pad measuring 8x10cm, designed for effective and safe treatment of car interiors. The white side is ideal for cleaning leather or removing dirt from plastic parts. The black, foamy side collects dust effectively. The fully synthetic materials used to make the Q²M ScrubPad EVO remain as good as new even after repeated use. The size and shape are convenient for cleaning intricately shaped items or crevices.

- https://www.ahifi.com/files/products_images/big/0/35_3.png
- https://www.ahifi.com/files/products_fotogaleries/big/0/54_6.png

Description:

The Gyeon Q²M ScrubPad EVO is a double-sided cleaning tool for vehicle interiors. The white side is ideal for cleaning leather or removing built-up dirt on plastic trim. The black foam side effectively collects dust. Fully synthetic materials stay like new after many uses. The size and shape are suitable for cleaning intricately shaped elements or crevices in the interior of cars.

Main features:
- Double cleaning applicator for the interior.
- White/black color.
- Dimensions: 8 x 10 cm.
- Price for 1 pc.
- Made in South Korea.

About the brand:

The Gyeon brand (pronounced "jion") comes from South Korea, where several global brands dealing with high-quality and innovative car cosmetics were created. South Koreans are known to be very precise and hardworking, and these qualities are perfectly reflected in the products of this brand. This car cosmetic offers advanced technologies at competitive prices. Gyeon develops and manufactures almost every product in its own laboratory and factory in South Korea with the help of the best scientists and experts in the field of car care. They support this process with in-depth research, intensive testing and an obsessive desire to improve everything they do. This approach results in exceptional products in terms of quality, durability and ease of use. Gyeon has always been unique and always strives to be one step ahead. Today, Gyeon is sold on 6 continents and in more than 100 countries around the world.

Description:

The Gyeon Q²M ScrubPad EVO is a double-sided cleaning pad for vehicle interiors. The white side is perfect for cleaning surfaces such as leather and plastics, providing a deep clean and the ability to remove ingrained dirt and grime with ease. The black side is a soft foam and great for collecting dust. The Scrub Pad is fully synthetic, and its size and shape make it easy to reach all areas with ease.
